title: the best mod ever (not)
description:
It's a funny little mod, it overhauls some villager trades making it harder to get emeralds while also unlocking the capability to become even richer
adds even better armour to the game to help you become the best.
body: This mod enhances Minecraft by introducing new armor, tools, ores, and villager trades to expand your crafting possibilities. With fresh materials to mine and powerful new equipment to craft, it adds depth to your adventure and survival experience. Villagers offer new trades, providing exciting opportunities to gear up and strengthen your character. Whether you’re exploring for rare ores or crafting powerful tools and armor, this mod keeps gameplay fresh and engaging. Ready to discover the new items and upgrades that await you?
